channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, May 10 (game #1567)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, May 10 (game #1064)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, May 10 (game #798)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 'Geology can make the risks of solar storms 1000 times worse': Below the US is a 200-kilometer-thick lost continent that could put data centers at risk by making strained electrical grids even worse
item.description: Scientists discovered a buried geological structure beneath eastern America that could amplify solar storm damage to power grids and infrastructure
